name: librats
description: C++ peer-to-peer networking library: encrypted P2P (Noise XX), DHT/mDNS discovery, NAT traversal (STUN/TURN/ICE), GossipSub pub/sub, file transfer, optional BitTorrent.

bindings.description: Build the C API used by Node.js / Python / Java bindings

search-features.description: Enable BitTorrent client (bt_*, tracker, disk_io, info_hash spider)
